claim_gate.label: Both systems satisfy the frozen recovery-integrity gate

recovery_resilience.development_policy: Development results may guide implementation and remain visible but cannot support a public leadership claim.
recovery_resilience.holdout_policy: Run once after implementation. A scoped public claim requires the complete holdout matrix and a passing verifier.
recovery_resilience.latency_policy: Report per-system p50 and p95 store/retrieve latency descriptively; correctness gates cannot be traded for speed.
